svg.text: Top panels: color = neighbor-disagreement score. Bottom panels: interpolated IDW surfaces with dashed shot-to-target lines.
- pt 0 (72,72): recently raised from 3265 to 3400 because it was short.
- pt 3 (72,108): drive team reported as bad; raw neighbor score here is low.
- pt 4 (40,134): close-to-goal shot that intentionally uses hood 0.000.
